inputs.label: Lot Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of standard lots (1 lot = 100,000 units)

inputs.label: Entry Price
inputs.businessContext: Exchange rate at which the position was entered

inputs.label: Exit Price
inputs.businessContext: Exchange rate at which the position was closed

inputs.label: Pip Size
inputs.businessContext: Smallest price increment (e.g., 0.0001 for most pairs, 0.01 for JPY pairs)

inputs.label: Pip Value
inputs.unit: account currency per pip per lot
inputs.businessContext: Monetary value of one pip per standard lot in the account currency

inputs.label: Leverage
inputs.businessContext: Leverage ratio provided by the broker (e.g., 100:1)
